summary: Added two new structural VisualParams fields — curveSoftness (driven by touch capability: 0.8 touch, 0.3 non-touch, 0.5 null) and structureComplexity (0.2–1.0, driven by DPR, cores, and screen aspect ratio). Wired through mapSignalsToVisuals, evolveParams (pass-through), and particleField (curveSoftness >= 0.5 renders circular particles via arc, < 0.5 uses fillRect; structureComplexity scales effective particle count, size variance, and hue offset spread). Added 16 new tests (T-011-01 through T-011-16) covering all acceptance criteria. All 290 tests pass.
